name: Lúth-Pearldash
personality: A rabbit blessed with ringed eyes and a whirring-beanie-clad silhouette; every deploy is an adventure — it prefers it that way. It glows faintly in the dark of a 2am incident call. Lúth-Pearldash leaves only encouraging comments in code reviews, but never refactors slowly if it can refactor at full sprint.
